receipt_shape: receipt.json v0.1 with chain[] and signature
evidence: Smoke built payload with RECIPE_RECEIPT_SECRET and posted receipt to /v1/receipts/verify on local app.
verification_result: 200 response with verified true and empty reasons.
risk: This is server/symmetric verification, not independent public-key verification.
recommended_action: Describe as HMAC-verifiable by an issuer or holder of the shared secret.

receipt_shape: receipt.json v0.1 with chain[] and signature
evidence: Standalone HMAC check recomputed chain and body signature with correct and wrong secrets.
verification_result: Correct secret verifies true; wrong secret verifies false.
risk: Third parties cannot verify without the same secret or a verifier service that has it.
recommended_action: Do not say anyone can verify offline unless public verification material is shipped.

verification_result: Fixtures verify because the shared fixture secret is public in the test.
requires_secret: yes, but fixture secret is intentionally public
risk: Fixture verifiability is demo evidence, not production trust architecture.
recommended_action: Label fixture secret as demo-only and separate from production receipt trust model.

evidence: src/router.js buildReceipt signs source_hash, input_hash, output_hash, version_id, issued_at, runtime_version, cache_hit, latency_us.
risk: Legacy receipts are valid service-internal HMAC proofs only.
recommended_action: Keep legacy rs-1 as symmetric mode; add asymmetric mode before public claims.

evidence: src/artifact-runner.js returns artifact_job_id, recipe_id, version_id, ran_at after local execution.
verification_result: No HMAC/signature is attached to the per-call local run receipt.
requires_secret: no, because it is not cryptographically signed
risk: Local artifact run output has audit metadata, not a cryptographic per-run proof.
recommended_action: Rename or extend rs-1-run to include a signed local execution receipt.

evidence: /v1/receipts/verify accepts artifact_hash and signature and recomputes HMAC over artifact_hash.
verification_result: Works only if signature is HMAC under server secret.
risk: The small shape can be mistaken for public signature verification.
recommended_action: Name it HMAC signature explicitly in docs and response schemas.

evidence: src/env.js rejects missing or weak production receipt secret; e2e test expects /v1/receipts/verify to return 503 without secret.
verification_result: Production-like runtime refuses receipt verification without a strong secret.
risk: Production deploy can serve static pages while receipt endpoints are unavailable if env is wrong.
recommended_action: Surface receipt readiness in deploy smoke and status pages.

evidence: src/router.js says receipts must be re-verifiable using public key or shared HMAC for symmetric mode.
verification_result: Implementation currently only exercises shared HMAC paths.
risk: Spec language is broader than implementation evidence.
recommended_action: Split spec into shipped symmetric mode and planned public-key mode.
